UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VAN DEN BRAND, JASON E RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GIOVANNETTI, KENNETH C $4,130.00 PRINCIPAL, $3,895.00 INTEREST, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,080.00

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VAN DEN BRAND, JASON E RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GIOVANNETTI, KENNETH C $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,130.00, BASED ON 1/3 OF $17,000.00 DEBT, MINUS REASONABLE VALUE OF COMPUTER EQUIPMENT IN PLAINTIFF'S POSSESSION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
